long_description:
NRE were alerted of link errors incrementing between fcr01a.fra04 Et7/1 <-> ppr02.fra04 et-1/0/21. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19727
short_description: fcr01a.fra04 Et7/1 <-> ppr02.fra04 et-1/0/21 | Link Errors
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via automation.)
